raw_consumer_statement:
Unauthorized charges on XX/XX/year> Galls {$150.00}. XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Received fraud alert from Best Buy Visa-responded immediately and confirmed charges were unauthorized- Person I spoke to could barely speak XXXX so possible misunderstanding. 

I was made aware on XX/XX/year> that Best Buy Visa investigated and found my claim was not substantiated. No explanation as to why it was unsubstantiated. I called several more times to contest these charges and was assured that they would be removed as recently as XX/XX/year> ( RepresentativeXXXX ) . 

I received a letter XX/XX/XXXX saying that they are pleased that I have accepted these charges. Someone is lying at their end and I hope a recording or transcript of the call will verify that the representative ( XXXX ) lied to me. 

I called XX/XX/XXXX after receiving the letter referenced above and spoke to XXXX. He said the case was closed but he would look into reopening it. I have placed XXXX calls over the past XXXX months trying to resolve this without success. 

I am hopeful your intervention can finally resolve this frustrating and ongoing issue. 

Thank you,
